user.title: Connect BeWave hub
user.description: Configure the IP address or hostname of the BeWave hub.

device_menu.title: Add switches
device_menu.description: Configured switches: {device_count}. You can add a switch now, or finish setup once at least one switch exists.

add_device.title: Add switch
add_device.description: Create one BeWave switch. 'Trigger command (old commandOn)' is the exact TCP text Home Assistant sends to BeWave. Example: {command_example}. Leave feedback fields empty for momentary-only behavior.

error.invalid_host: Enter a valid host or IP address.
error.at_least_one_device: Add at least one switch before finishing setup.
error.invalid_device: Check the switch fields. Name and command are required, and feedback must contain both ON and OFF messages if used.

abort.already_configured: This BeWave hub is already configured.

init.title: Manage switches
init.description: Configured switches: {device_count}. Add, edit, or remove switches.

add_device.title: Add switch
add_device.description: Create one BeWave switch. 'Trigger command (old commandOn)' is the exact TCP text Home Assistant sends to BeWave. Example: {command_example}.

edit_device.title: Edit switch
edit_device.description: Edit the switch details. 'Trigger command (old commandOn)' should match the trigger configured in BeWave. Example: {command_example}.

error.invalid_device: Check the switch fields. Name and command are required, and feedback must contain both ON and OFF messages if used.
